review: I got in a fight with my son. I got in trouble pushing him making him bleed. The cop arrested me. I could not go back to my 1/2 million dollar house. This man got my house back on the exact day he told me.   My son tried to rent rooms.This lawyer saved my butt evicted as stated on date. Done. Thank you. Thank you.    Tom B

If you are looking for an attorney read this before making a decision with Nathan Mcallister.I usually don't write any reviews (especially negative ones) its hard for me to write this one most of the time we let is slide by but NOT this time. Im an owner of a small business we needed an attorney we made the decision to go with Nathan as he was very confided that he can tackle it and we will win the case (it was a very simple one) we meet up once every 2 weeks and talked about details on our current case , well..... every meeting was ($400 to $800) for him to take time to prepare documents for the next court date. As im not highly experienced in this field he took advantage of me and my hard earned money and dragged out for 2 years until one day we could no longer put in money in winning the case, we called it out and said this the last check, magically next week all is over and we lost the case which was very disappointing because we had all the correct documents and paperwork to prove our case. Every time we needed to talk or email DURING the 2 year time frame (as money was coming in) we always go ahold of him, last meeting was the turning point as we sat and talked i asked one simple question "Nathan how did we lose this case when we had ALL the prove"? He got very angry at me, face tuned red his response was thats none of your business literally threw the paperwork at me as said "Get out now don't want you in this office ever again" Nathan is very unprofessional and dishonest in his dealings when the money quits coming in he does not want to do anything with you we lost with him $67,000 dollars & we lost our initial product that we sold. And we lost the case. Please be very careful & wise when choosing Nathan as your attorney. Keep in mind state of WA prohibits you to hire a second Attorney if you currently have someone hired simultaneously. Do more solid research and hire someone that actually cares about you and that will deal with integrity.
Needed eviction. He looked at calendar said a date. And my problem was done. He did exactly what he said. Hire him!!!
